# Amaljith Kuttamath

> AI engineer building small in-browser tools that make language models legible — what they see, how sure they are, and where they break.

This is a personal site. Every app runs client-side (WebGPU / WASM / HTTP Range reads). No server, no API keys, no upload.

## Pages

- [Home](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/): the four apps, Radar strip, lab list
- [Apps](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/apps): four in-browser tools
- [Lab](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/lab): educational experiments and research libraries
- [Radar](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/radar): daily AI intelligence board
- [About](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/about): background, research, contact

## Apps

- [Tokenizer Arena](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/apps/tokenizer): compare five real production tokenizers (GPT-4o, Claude, Llama 3, GPT-2, BERT) side by side
- [PDF Lens](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/apps/pdf-lens): drop a PDF, get clean text and per-model token cost via LiteParse WASM
- [Probability X-ray](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/apps/probability-xray): chat with SmolLM2 on WebGPU; every generated word is colored by the model's confidence, with hover-to-see runners-up
- [GGUF Inspect](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/apps/gguf-inspect): paste a Hugging Face GGUF URL to see architecture, quantization, parameter count, context length, and fit on common GPU tiers — parsed from the file header via HTTP Range read

## Lab

- [microGPT Trainer](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/lab/microgpt): train a tiny transformer live, watch embeddings, attention, MLP, and loss
- [Watch a Model Think](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/lab/watch-model-think): step through GPT-2 with sparse autoencoders attached

## Research libraries

- [trust-bench](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/trust-bench): interpretability toolkit for Llama 3.1 8B
- [jlens-replication](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/jlens-replication): Anthropic Jacobian lens replicated on small open-weight models
- [sae-explorer](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/sae-explorer): one SAE feature that fires on "and" across six languages in Gemma 2 2B
- [mlx-interp](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/mlx-interp): first mechanistic interpretability library for Apple MLX
- [hybrid-attention-mlx](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/autoresearch-mlx-qwen-3-5): from-scratch MLX implementation of Qwen3.5 hybrid DeltaNet + full-attention

## Feeds

- [Sitemap](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/sitemap-index.xml)
